qa_pairs.question: What policy is listed under 'Policy requirements'?
qa_pairs.answer: The Tri-Agency RDM Policy is listed under 'Policy requirements'.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find the Tri-Agency RDM Policy?
qa_pairs.answer: You can find the Tri-Agency RDM Policy at: https://science.gc.ca/site/science/en/interagency-research-funding/policies-and-guidelines/research-data-management/tri-agency-research-data-management-policy.

qa_pairs.question: What guide provides information on repository options in Canada?
qa_pairs.answer: The 'Repository Options in Canada: A Portage Guide' provides information on repository options.

qa_pairs.question: What are some research data repositories mentioned?
qa_pairs.answer: The Federated Research Data Repository and Borealis are mentioned as research data repositories.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I access the Federated Research Data Repository?
qa_pairs.answer: The Federated Research Data Repository can be accessed at: https://www.frdr-dfdr.ca/repo/?locale=en.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find Borealis?
qa_pairs.answer: Borealis can be found at: https://borealisdata.ca/.
